description: DyWix SEO hub datasets — edit JSON files directly, no database required.

files.services.json: Level 2 service hubs (slug, name, category, equipment, process)
files.cities.json: Level 3 city hubs (slug, name, state, region, distance_km, description)
files.localities.json: Level 4 locality hubs (slug, name, city, metro, description, nearby)
files.landmarks.json: Level 5 landmark hubs (slug, name, type, city, distance_km, nearby_areas)
files.industries.json: Level 6 industry hubs (slug, name, category, description, use_cases)
files.blogs.json: Blog cluster metadata (slug, title, category, excerpt, service)
